name: Clockwork Trap

abilities.name: Inanimate
abilities.text: This model may not activate and always counts as having activated this turn. During the end phase, this model's owner may choose to kill this model.

abilities.name: "It's A Trap!"
abilities.text: When an enemy model ends its activation within 3", one model with this ability may be placed into base contact with it and declare a /// action targeting it.

abilities.name: "My Leg, Ah!"
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate within 3" gain a Staggered token.

actions.name: Bear Trap
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

extraction_notes: Peon (4) indicated below artwork - model_limit would be 4
The /// in "It's A Trap!" ability appears to be three forward slashes representing an attack action symbol that I cannot definitively identify
